title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 59.630 - Compensation for rerecording copyist
text:
59.630.  Compensation for rerecording copyist. — The person employed as provided by section 59.610 shall receive such compensation as the county commission shall deem reasonable, not to exceed eight hundred dollars per annum, to be paid out of the county treasury, so long as his services may be required.
(RSMo 1939 § 3648) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3258; 1919 § 10620; 1909 § 10431
